raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Janas deht es kluffu ne
zeettischu / un Jerusalemes
labbad es ne riinschu/ ka-
meir winnas Taifniba useet ka
Spohschums / un winnas Pe-
stitchana eedeggahs ka kahda
Lahpa.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 2,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un tee Pagani redsehs ta-
wu Taifnibu/ un wiſti Rehninti
tawu Gohdu/ un tu tapsi ar
weenu jannu Wahrdnu dehweta/
fo ta KUNG A Mutte skaidri
isfauks.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 3,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un tu buhti weens skaists
Krohuis eekſch ta KUNGA Roh-
kas/ un weena Rehnixa Zeppure
tawa Deewa Rohka.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 4,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Us tewi ne taps wairs faz-
zihts : Ta Atstahta/ un ustawn
Semmi ne taps wairs fazzihts :
Ta Jspohstita. Bettu tapsi no-
fankta manna Patiffchana pee
tahs/ un tawa Semine ta Lau-
lata. Jo tam KUNGAM irr
labba Patiffchana pee tewis/ un
tawa Semine taps laulata.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 5,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Jo ka weens Jauneklis
kahdu Zumprawu mihte/ ta mih-
lehs tew tawi Behrni/ un ka tas
Bruhdgans preezajahs pahr to
"
    },
    {
      "n": 6,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Ak Jerusaleme! es eeze-
schu Sargus us taweem Muh-
reem/ kas bes Mitteſchanas nei
Deena nei Nafti kluhu zeetihg/
ak juhs! kas juhs to KUNGU
mahzat peeminneht/ lai nefahda
Kluhiba pee jums irr.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 7,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "* Ne zeeschat kluhu preekſch
winna/ teekams wiſch apstipri-
na/ un kamehr wiſch Jerusale-
mi teizainu padarra wirs Sem-
mes.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 8,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tas KUNG S irr sweh-
rejs pee fawas labbas Rohkas /
un pee ta Elkoka fawa Stipru-
ma; Es ne dohchu wairs tawu
Labbihu taweem Eenaidneekeem
ehst/ un Sweschineeki ne dsers
wairs tawu Wihnu/ pee ka tu
effi strahdajs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 9,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Bet kas to takrahj/ tee to
ehdihg / un flawehs to KUNG-
GU/ un kas winnu laſſihs/ tee
dsers winnu eekſch manneem
wehteem Pagalmeem.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 10,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Eita zauri / eita zauri
zaur tahm Wahrtim/ fataifajt
teem Laudim to Zetta/ lihdsina-
jeet/ lihdsinajeet weenu staiga-
jamu Zettu/ at remmeet tohs Ak-
mirus/ iszelleet weenu Karrogu
pee teem Laudim.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 11,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Rangi/ tas KUNG S
lee dsirdeht lihds Pafaules Gal-
lam. Sakkajt tai Zianas Meitai:
R
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
